faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Data monitoring, privacy, and Android requirements.

items.question: What is Roam Guard?
items.answer: An Android app for travelers that monitors per-app mobile data in real time and warns you before your eSIM or roaming package runs out. Package: com.zuki.apps.roamguard.

items.question: Does Roam Guard upload my usage to the cloud?
items.answer: No. Usage statistics are processed and stored on your device. You may manually export CSV (Pro) and share it yourself.

items.question: What is the VPN for?
items.answer: Ultra Saver mode uses a local VPN on your phone to block mobile data for apps you have not approved. Traffic is not sent to Roam Guard servers.

items.question: Is Roam Guard free?
items.answer: Yes. Core monitoring, alerts, travel modes, and one travel profile are free. Roam Guard Pro is an optional one-time upgrade.

items.question: Does it work on iPhone?
items.answer: Roam Guard v1.0.0 is Android only (Android 10+).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Zuki Apps handles information when you use Roam Guard and related pages at zukiapps.com/roamguard.

section1.title: 1. Who we are
section1.content: The data controller is Zuki Apps. Contact details are at the end of this Policy.
section1.content2: This Policy applies to the Roam Guard app and the legal pages we publish for the product.

section2.title: 2. Information we collect
section2.content: Roam Guard reads per-app mobile data via Android usage access. This data is stored locally and is not uploaded by the app.
items: Per-app mobile data usage — processed and stored on device only
Crash logs / diagnostics (Firebase Crashlytics) — if the app crashes
Purchase history — via Google Play Billing for Pro unlock
Support email — if you contact us directly

section3.title: 3. How we use information
items: Monitor per-app mobile data and show alerts
Operate optional Ultra Saver local VPN when you enable it
Validate Pro purchases via Google Play
Diagnose crashes and respond to support
section3.content2: We do not sell your personal information.

section4.title: 4. Permissions and local VPN
section4.content: Roam Guard may request usage access, notifications, and optional VPN permission for Ultra Saver mode.
section4.content2: Ultra Saver uses a local VPN on your device only. Traffic is not sent to Roam Guard servers. You approve VPN via the standard Android dialog.

section5.title: 5. Storage and retention
section5.content: Usage data remains on your device until you delete the app or clear app data.
section5.content2: Support emails are retained as long as needed to resolve your request.

section6.title: 6. Third-party services
section6.content: Crash diagnostics may use Firebase Crashlytics. Purchases are handled by Google Play.
section6.content2: Those providers process data under their own policies.

section7.title: 7. Your rights and children
section7.content: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or object to certain processing. Contact us to exercise rights.
section7.content2: Roam Guard is not directed to children under 13 (or the minimum age in your country). We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

section8.title: 8. Changes
section8.content: We may update this Policy from time to time. We will post the revised version with a new Last updated date.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.metaDescription: Terms of Use for Roam Guard.
terms.intro: Please read these Terms carefully before using Roam Guard. By downloading or using the app, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms govern your use of Roam Guard operated by Zuki Apps. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
section1.content2: If you use the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
items: Live per-app mobile data dashboard
Smart usage alerts and travel profiles
Optional Ultra Saver local VPN blocking
Optional Roam Guard Pro one-time upgrade

section3.title: 3. Monitoring disclaimer
section3.content: Roam Guard is a data monitoring utility. It does not guarantee exact carrier billing totals.
section3.content2: Verify critical limits with your carrier when needed.

section4.title: 4. Purchases
section4.content: Roam Guard Pro, if purchased, is a one-time Google Play purchase. Google's terms and refund policies apply.
section4.content2: Use Restore purchases after reinstall on the same Google account.

section5.title: 5. Acceptable use
items: Use the Service for unlawful purposes
Reverse engineer the app except as permitted by law
Interfere with security or stability features
Create content that infringes others' rights

section6.title: 6. Disclaimer
section6.content: The Service is provided as is without warranties of any kind.
section6.content2: You are responsible for backing up any CSV exports you create.

section7.title: 7. Limitation of liability
section7.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Zuki Apps shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the Service.

section8.title: 8. Changes
section8.content: We may modify these Terms. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How Roam Guard handles your data

q1.question: Why does Roam Guard need usage access?
q1.answer: Android requires this permission for apps to read per-app mobile data usage. Without it, Roam Guard cannot monitor.

q2.question: What data leaves my device?
q2.answer: Optional crash reports via Firebase Crashlytics if the app crashes. Usage stats are not uploaded.

q3.question: Is Pro a subscription?
q3.answer: No. Roam Guard Pro is a one-time purchase via Google Play.

q4.question: Monitoring stopped after restart?
q4.answer: Open Roam Guard once — monitoring resumes if it was enabled.

additionalHelp.title: Need more help?
additionalHelp.description: If you could not find an answer, email zuki.apps@gmail.com. We typically respond within 24–48 hours.
